She crosses the room to the wolf sculpture.

(moving toward her, turning

Furious moves to the wolf sculpture. He PLUNGES HIS HAND

Furious HURLS the device hard against the floor, and it

CLOSE ON ONE OF THE PIECES -
an insect sized device that gives off an even higher pitched,
